g.title: Verification of join condition existence to prevent accidental Cartesian Products.
Hash Joins and Merge Joins require equi-join semantics (Theta-joins use NLJ).

div.p: Complexity: O(N * M) Strategy: Brute force nested iteration. Constraint: Used for non-equi joins or tiny relations (< 10 tuples). AVX-512: Limited vectorization (SIMD-IF).

g.title: Searching for B+Tree or Hash Index on the join columns of the inner relation.

div.p: Complexity: O(N * log M) Strategy: Outer scan, Inner index probe. Requirement: Index on join column of the inner table. Cache: Inner index blocks stay in L3 Cache.
Complexity: O(N + M) Strategy: Build phase (Hash Table) + Probe phase. I/O: Sequential scan. Memory-intensive. Grace Variant: Spills buckets to disk if partition > RAM.

g.title: Identify if Child nodes (e.g., IndexScan) provide required sort order.

div.p: Complexity: O(N log N + M log M) Strategy: Sort phases + Linear merge scan. Advantage: Produces sorted output (Interesting Order). I/O: High Sort Overhead; Minimal Join Overhead.

ol.li: Outer/Inner: HashJoin MUST use smaller table as BUILD side.
Pruning: Discard plans with cost > 1.5x current global minimum.

ul.li: Grace Hash Join: Must support recursive partitioning if bucket > working_mem.
Early Exit: If NLJoin cost exceeds current best plan during scan, terminate loop immediately.
Block NLJ: Default to Block-Nested Loop (BNLJ) with 64-page buffer for any theta join.
Thread-Safety: All physical operators must support GetNext() in a multi-threaded execution context.

div.p: Hardware Optimization Note: Hash Tables use SIMD-masked comparisons to resolve collisions at 8-key intervals using AVX-512 _mm512_mask_cmpeq_epi64_mask.

div.h1: Physical Operator Decision Tree (Join Selection Strategy)
div.p: Subsystem: Query Optimizer / Cost-Based Optimizer (CBO) Context: Milestone 4 Implementation - Physical Planning Phase Target Hardware: Intel® Xeon® Scalable Processors (AVX-512 Optimized) Objective: Select most efficient physical join implementation based on relational metadata.

g.title: Verification of join condition existence to prevent accidental Cartesian Products.
Hash Joins and Merge Joins require equi-join semantics (Theta-joins use NLJ).
Searching for B+Tree or Hash Index on the join columns of the inner relation.
Identify if Child nodes (e.g., IndexScan) provide required sort order.
